@graph.name: Brightest Expert for Complex Endeavors
@graph.reviewBody: If you have ever bought or sold a company, you know that it's an incredibly complex endeavor, sometimes with many unexpected twists and turns along the way. The smart person soon learns this is not something you should take on without the help of an expert to guide you. Phil Reese may well be the best and brightest expert you can find.  Phil was amazing to work with throughout the entire process of selling our company. He was always highly professional and available to answer every kind of question or concern. We really don't know how we could have gotten through the tedious, roller-coaster process without him. And best of all, his guidance assured us the best possible results with an excellent buyer and top-level offer at the end of the day. We highly recommend Phil Reese!

@graph.name: Outstanding Personalized Service and Results
@graph.reviewBody: To anyone looking to buy or sell a business, do yourself a HUGE favor and use the services of Phil Reese! We had used other business brokers in the past and had less than desired results. In 2015 Phil listed and sold our multi-million dollar business in 6 months. His knowledge, support, enthusiasm, professionalism and his personalized service is outstanding! Listing our business with Phil was absolutely the best decision we could have made! We love him and so will you! Mark and Juanita Wdowiak

@graph.name: Professionalism and Integrity Defined
@graph.reviewBody: I wish I could give 10 stars.  Phil was an absolute professional to work with.  He would answer any questions we had in a timely manner, let us know the status on a regular basis and always kept our best interest at top of his list.  The top two traits I can think of to describe him are Professionalism and Integrity. You will not go wrong with choosing Phil.

@graph.name: Going Out of the Way to Help
@graph.reviewBody: Phil came highly recommended to us after selling a friend of ours business. So we gave him a call and Phil did a great job selling our business. He was there every step of the way going out of his way to help in all areas. I would and will recommend him to anyone wanting to sell their business.

@graph.name: Real Professionalism and Service
@graph.reviewBody: We were very pleased with Phil Reese, he is a real pro.  We highly recommend his services.

@graph.name: Kind and Professional Consulting
@graph.reviewBody: I had a question regarding my business, and Phil was very kind, taking his time to converse with me, even though I didn't use his service. He was awesome, and I will definitely keep his information and refer him to clients. A very professional gentleman.
